stat_block.text: A *spellstriker staff* is wrought iron with gleaming arcane sigils etched into its surface and a sharp point at the bottom. Used as a weapon, the staff is a *+1 striking shifting staff*.

traits.name: Evocation
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the evocation school of magic, typically involving energy and elemental forces.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Staff
traits.text: This magic item holds spells of a particular theme and allows a spellcaster to cast additional spells by preparing the staff.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.trigger: You use Spellstrike with a non-cantrip spell and miss with the Strike
abilities.effect: An explosion of magical energy—stored up for the Spellstrike—explodes out. All creatures in a 5-foot emanation take 1d6 damage per level of the spell, with a basic Reflex save against your spell DC. This damage is the same type the spell would have dealt, and the activation gains that trait; if the spell would have dealt multiple types of damage, choose one of them. If the damage of the explosion is mental, the save is Will instead of Reflex.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

stat_block.craft_requirements: You have the magus's Spellstrike activity. Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.

variants.name: Spellstriker Staff
variants.text:
* Cantrip produce flame
* 1st echoing weapon , true strike
* 2nd acid arrow , telekinetic maneuver

variants.name: Spellstriker Staff (Greater)
variants.text:
Used as a weapon, the staff is a +2 striking shifting staff . 
* 3rd echoing weapon , haste
* 4th acid arrow , weapon storm

variants.name: Spellstriker Staff (Major)
variants.text:
Used as a weapon, the staff is a +2 greater striking shifting staff .
* 5th blink charge , echoing weapon , vampiric touch
* 6th acid arrow , weapon storm
* 7th blink charge , true target
